title: BCCL Executive Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
post_name: Executive Programme exam passed Trainee (Practical Training of Company Secretary)
short_info: Bharat Coking Coal Limited (BCCL) Recruitment 2026: Bharat Coking Coal Limited has released the official notification for 2 Executive Programme exam passed Trainee (Practical Training of Company Secretary) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Jharkhand. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid PSU jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years as on 01-04-2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Passed Executive program and completed the Executive Development Programme from Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI).
qualification.details: Completed and passed Executive program and the required period of Executive Development Programme from Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI) as on the crucial date. Candidates who have already completed their Management Training need not to apply.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Executive Programme exam passed Trainee (Practical Training of Company Secretary)

selection_process: Scrutiny of applications based on documents/certificates uploaded. Merit list will be drawn by arranging the passing percentage of Executive program of ICSI in descending order. Tie-breaking criteria: first by preferring candidate who passed earlier in executive program
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 16-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BCCL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
